letterOfInstruction.content:
Dear Family,

If you're reading this, I want you to know that I love you all more than words can express. I've tried to organize everything to make this process as smooth as possible.

First Steps:
1. Contact the named executor — they know the overall plan.
2. Contact the attorney — they have copies of all legal documents.
3. Contact the CPA for tax matters.
4. Do NOT rush any financial decisions. Take at least 6 months.

Important Notes:
- The password manager contains all digital credentials. The emergency kit is in the home safe.
- Crypto assets require careful handling. See the crypto section and contact the executor who has been briefed.
- The rental property can be sold or kept for income — the property manager handles everything.
- The consulting business should be wound down. Notify clients and close the LLC.

For the Kids:
- I've set aside letters in the home safe, to be given at age 18.
- Their education funds are in 529 plans.
- The named guardian has agreed to take care of them if needed.

Please take care of each other.

With all my love,
John
letterOfInstruction.notes: EXAMPLE letter. Last updated March 2026. Review annually.

finalWishesAndServices.funeralArrangements: Keep it simple and celebratory. Memorial gathering preferred.

finalWishesAndServices.socialMedia: Memorialize primary social account. Remove others after 6 months.
finalWishesAndServices.otherInstructions: Scatter ashes at favorite outdoor location.
finalWishesAndServices.notes: Pre-discussed wishes with spouse and executor.

vaultBackup.fileLocation: Labeled USB drive in the fireproof safe in the home office closet. Second copy on the home NAS under /documents/estate/liferelay-backup.json
vaultBackup.passwordHint: Same as the home safe combination but with our wedding year appended
vaultBackup.accessInstructions: 1. Get the USB drive from the fireproof safe (combo is with spouse and executor). 2. Open liferelay.app in a web browser. 3. Click Import Vault on the dashboard. 4. Select the .json file from the USB drive. 5. Enter the encryption password when prompted.
vaultBackup.notes: Backup updated monthly. Spouse knows this exists and has the safe combination. Executor has a sealed envelope with the safe combo.

notes: EXAMPLE VAULT — All data in this file is fictional and for demonstration purposes only. Names, addresses, phone numbers, account numbers, and other identifiers do not refer to real people or organizations. Use this file to explore the Life Relay app structure or as a starting template.
